subcodes.first_line: O thou wanderer in the pathway of thy Lord! Praise be unto God that thou hast witnessed the results of this journey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته دیار در سبیل پروردگار الحمد لله نتائج این سفر را ملاحظه نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
